HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

34class GreenFHom3DPer2D : public GreenFHom3DPer {
35 private:

37 // Quadrature helper

40
41 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
42 // Initialization
43 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

48
49 protected:
50 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
51 // Lattice/reciprocal geometry
52 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
53 rvec a1;
54 double a1a1;
55 double norma1;
56 rvec b1;
57
58 rvec a2;
59 double a2a2;
60 double norma2;
61 double a1a2;
62 double crossFactor;
63 rvec b2;
64 rvec perp;
65
66 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
67 // Lattice helpers
68 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
74 rvec PrimitiveCell(rvec& target);
75
80 void Reciprocal();
81
86 void ToPlane();
87
88 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
89 // Ewald's acceleration technique
90 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
96 dcmplx Ewald(rvec r);
97
103 dcmplx EwaldSmoothed(rvec r);
104
110 cvec GradientEwald(rvec r);
111
117 cvec GradientEwaldSmoothed(rvec r);
118
119 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
120 // Ewald split — spatial (real‑space images)
121 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
127 dcmplx EwaldSpatial(rvec r);
128
134 cvec GradientEwaldSpatial(rvec r);
135
141 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> EwaldAndGradientSpatial(rvec r);
142
148 dcmplx EwaldSpatialSmoothed(rvec r);
149
155 cvec GradientEwaldSpatialSmoothed(rvec r);
156
162 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> EwaldAndGradientSpatialSmoothed(rvec r);
163
164 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
165 // Ewald split — spectral (reciprocal‑lattice sum)
166 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
172 dcmplx EwaldSpectral(rvec r);
173
179 cvec GradientEwaldSpectral(rvec r);
180
186 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> EwaldAndGradientSpectral(rvec r);
187
188 public:
189 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
190 // Construction
191 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
200 GreenFHom3DPer2D(dcmplx wavelength, dcmplx epsilonMedium, rvec wavevector,
201 rvec latticeVector, rvec latticeVector2);
202
212 GreenFHom3DPer2D(dcmplx wavelength, dcmplx epsilonMedium, dcmplx muMedium,
213 rvec wavevector, rvec latticeVector, rvec latticeVector2);
214
215 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
216 // Thresholds & translations
217 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
225 bool AboveThresholdTranslate(Triangle* T, Triangle* Tp, rvec t);
226
227 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
228 // Pointwise evaluations (Bloch‑periodic)
229 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
236 dcmplx Evaluate(rvec r, rvec rp);
237
245 dcmplx EvaluateTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t);
246
253 dcmplx Smoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
254
262 dcmplx SmoothedTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t);
263
270 cvec Gradient(rvec r, rvec rp);
271
279 cvec GradientTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t);
280
287 cvec GradientSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp);
288
296 cvec GradientSmoothedTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t);
297
305 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> EvaluateandGradientTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t);
306
314 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> EvaluateandGradientSmoothedTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t);
315
316 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
317 // RWG‑weighted integrals
318 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
327 dcmplx IntegrateD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
328
337 dcmplx IntegrateK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
338
345 cvec IntegrateDelta(rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
346
353 cvec IntegrateKappa(rvec r, RWGFun* fp);
354
361 std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
362
369 std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> PairK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp);
370
371 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
372 // Batched helpers
373 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
380 virtual void SameTriDK(const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec,
381 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
382 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> > >& DK);
383
390 virtual void SameTriDeltaKappa(rvec r, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
391 std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec> >& DeltaKappa);
392};

Periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function (abstract base).

Gaussian-quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.
